ticker.noChart: Not enough data to draw the curve.

errors.sectorNotMapped: No sector benchmark available for this ticker.

errors.rateLimit: Market data temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.

narrative.title: AI Narrative

narrative.errorReload: Narrative generated but couldn't be reloaded

watchlist.removeAria: Remove this ticker from the watchlist

news.empty: No recent news for this ticker.
news.noSummary: No summary available — open the article for the full text.

analyst.title: Analyst recommendations
analyst.notCovered: No analyst is currently covering this ticker.

trend.flat: Stable recommendations over the last 6 months

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.notCovered: No earnings data available for this ticker.

import.title: Sync from Wealthsimple
import.intro: Import your CSV positions export. A portfolio will be created or updated for each account, and a snapshot will be saved for historical tracking.

errors.preview: Couldn't read the file. Check that it's a Wealthsimple positions export.

suivi.title: Portfolio tracking
suivi.intro: History of CSV imports — each import creates a dated snapshot of your positions.
suivi.empty: No history yet. Import a CSV to start tracking.
suivi.loadError: Couldn't load the history. Please retry.

previewPage.intro: Enter a ticker to view the full system + user prompt that the narrative pipeline would send to the LLM. No call is made.

configurationPage.title: Runtime configuration
configurationPage.intro: Edit live what normally lives in application-local.yml. Changes apply without restarting the backend.
configurationPage.placeholderMasked: •••• already set — type a new value to replace it

marketProvider.title: Market provider
marketProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (deterministic, offline) and Twelve Data (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

newsProvider.title: News provider
newsProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (synthetic feed) and Finnhub (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

analystProvider.title: Analyst recommendations provider
analystProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (deterministic per symbol) and Finnhub (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

earningsProvider.title: Earnings provider
earningsProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (deterministic per symbol) and Finnhub (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

llmProvider.title: LLM provider
llmProvider.description: Picks the engine that writes the ticker dossier narrative: Claude (Anthropic cloud, requires anthropic.api.key in application-local.yml) or Ollama (local, requires an Ollama daemon listening). The switch takes effect on the next analysis.

twelveData.title: Twelve Data — API key
twelveData.description: Market data provider (quotes, OHLC, indicators). Free tier 800 credits/day. Get an API key.
twelveData.sectorHint: Heads-up: the Sector benchmark on the ticker dossier uses Finnhub even when Twelve Data is the market provider. Set the Finnhub key below as well to keep that toggle working.

finnhub.title: Finnhub — API key
finnhub.description: Provider for the news section on the ticker dossier. Free tier 60 calls/min. Get an API key.

ollamaModel.title: Ollama — model
ollamaModel.description: Tag of the model used when the LLM provider is Ollama (e.g. qwen2.5:3b, llama3.2:3b). The model must be pulled locally (`ollama pull <tag>`). The Test button sends a short prompt and measures latency.

claudeModel.title: Claude — model
claudeModel.description: Identifier of the model used when the LLM provider is Claude (e.g. claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-5). The Test button validates that the model responds with the Anthropic key set in YAML.

llmTimeout.title: LLM timeout
llmTimeout.description: Maximum duration for an LLM call before giving up — covers the HTTP read timeout backend-side (Ollama), the frontend polling window, and the job dedup window. Push it when testing a heavy Ollama model with a long cold-start ; lower it to fail faster while debugging.

cacheTtl.title: Market & news cache — TTL
cacheTtl.description: How long Twelve Data and Finnhub responses are cached (Caffeine). Shorter = fresher data but more API calls.
